mapper.sql: id, menu_name, parent_id, order_num, path, component, query, menu_type, visible, perms, icon, status, create_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_menu WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted = 0 AND menu_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%') AND status = #{status} ORDER BY order_num ASC
SELECT FROM sys_menu WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY order_num ASC
SELECT FROM sys_menu WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY order_num ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_menu (menu_name, parent_id, order_num, path, component, query, menu_type, visible, perms, icon, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES (#{menuName}, #{parentId}, #{orderNum}, #{path}, #{component}, #{query}, #{menuType}, #{visible}, #{perms}, #{icon}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_menu SET menu_name=#{menuName}, parent_id=#{parentId}, order_num=#{orderNum}, path=#{path}, component=#{component}, query=#{query}, menu_type=#{menuType}, visible=#{visible}, perms=#{perms}, icon=#{icon}, status=#{status}, update_time=#{updateTime} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE sys_menu SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_menu SET deleted = 1 WHERE id IN #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.menu_name, m.parent_id, m.order_num, m.path, m.component, m.query, m.menu_type, m.visible, m.perms, m.icon, m.status, m.create_time, m.update_time, m.deleted FROM sys_menu m LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.deleted = 0 AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.order_num ASC

SELECT m.id, m.menu_name, m.parent_id, m.order_num, m.path, m.component, m.query, m.menu_type, m.visible, m.perms, m.icon, m.status, m.create_time, m.update_time, m.deleted FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id WHERE rm.role_id = #{roleId} AND m.deleted = 0 ORDER BY m.order_num ASC

SELECT DISTINCT m.perms FROM sys_menu m LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON m.id = rm.menu_id LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON rm.role_id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.perms IS NOT NULL AND m.perms != ''
